description: Thumbtack is a U.S. marketplace for home and local services that connects customers with service professionals. It provides search, reviews, request/lead flows, messaging, and on-demand order capabilities for partners and pros.
summary: Thumbtack exposes a partner REST API at https://api.thumbtack.com/api secured by OAuth 2.0, plus a public streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint at https://mcp.thumbtack.com/mcp.
